# Architectural Map: Gemini CLI Skill System
High-density registry of agentic capabilities optimized for local execution and forensic analysis.

## Core Entry Points
- `104a.mfdb.bejson`: Central MFDB manifest (The Source of Truth).
- `[skill-name]/SKILL.md`: Individual procedural instruction sets.

## Module Index (Categorized)

### Skills Management
- `skills-builder`: Standardized architect for new skill development and packaging.
- `skills-registry-manager`: Administrative tool for registry auditing, syncing, and federation.

### Analysis & Reporting
- `analysis-perceptual-decomposition`: Recursive forensic analysis, pattern recognition, and intent modeling.
- `post-analysis-reporting-in-depth`: Formal forensic dossier and architectural reconstruction report constructor.
- `post-analysis-reporting-concise`: High-density intelligence brief and executive system-level audit generator.

### BEJSON Framework
- `bejson-manager-core`: Definitive manager for BEJSON 104/104a/104db core operations and field mapping.
- `bejson-state-cognitive`: Agentic state management, security sandboxing, and Hive Mind orchestration.

### Design & Documentation
- `css-becss`: Authoritative standard for BEJSON CSS (BECSS) refactoring and OKLCH tokenization.
- `doc-architect-agentic`: 2026-standard documentation generator for AX-optimized READMEs, llms.txt, and AGENTS.md.

### Protocols
- `protocol-update-persistent`: Staged refactoring framework with disk checkpoints and crash-recovery.

## Data Structures
- `SkillRegistry (104a)`: Fields: `entity_name`, `file_path`, `description`, `version`.
- `UpdateStaging (104)`: Fields for persistent task tracking and recovery.

## Development Pathways
- Sync: `cp -r ~/.gemini/skills/* ~/build/skill_system/`
- Register: Update `104a.mfdb.bejson` manually or via `skills-registry-manager`.
- Test: Use `analysis-perceptual-decomposition` to audit registry integrity.

---
*Generated for AI Agent Context Optimization | Relational ID: gcli-skill-sys-map-v2*
